title: Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences Research and Development
content:
Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences Research and Development

Üsküdar University fosters a sustainable and socially beneficial research and development ecosystem centered on the production and dissemination of knowledge. All research activities are structured in line with the 2024–2028 Strategic Plan, ensuring alignment with institutional goals.

Strategic Approach

The university approaches research as a multidimensional process, extending beyond academic output to include industry collaboration, social impact, and international visibility. Within this framework:

Information resources are used efficiently and effectively,

Research capacity of both faculty and students is continuously enhanced,

Knowledge sharing is promoted across academia, media, health, and technology sectors,

Interdisciplinary and creative research environments are actively supported.

Research Infrastructure and Resources

The Directorate of Research, Development, Innovation and Project Policies (ARGEYEP) provides comprehensive guidance for project development, grant applications, and research consultancy. Operating in coordination with all faculties and research centers, ARGEYEP supports initiatives ranging from graduate theses to international research collaborations.

The university’s research infrastructure includes:

Expert academic staff,

Well-equipped laboratories and recording studios,

Access to e-libraries and digital databases,

Specialized thematic research centers that are continuously improved and made accessible.

Continuous Monitoring and Improvement

All academic units collaborate with ARGEYEP in planning, executing, and monitoring research activities. Through this structure:

Training on project writing and management is provided,

Scientific publication performance is monitored regularly,

Student participation in research and practical projects is encouraged,

Institutional knowledge is expanded through publications such as patents, books, articles, and conference papers.

Academic Publications and International Visibility

Üsküdar University’s academic output is supported by both national and international publications. Journals published by academic units are indexed in various databases, enhancing global recognition. Students also contribute through applied projects and creative works, often earning awards in national and international competitions.

Regularly organized symposiums, panels, and international collaborations further strengthen the university’s global research visibility, while fostering sectoral interaction and knowledge exchange.
